headline: Supermicro Adds Largest Silicon Valley Campus - New DCBBS Facility to Advance the Delivery of Next-Generation AI Data Centers
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), an AI, Enterprise, Storage, 5G/Edge Total Solution Provider with optimized Data Center Building Block Solutions ® (DCBBS), today announced its largest US location with the advanced DCBBS campus and a significant expansion of its Silicon Valley operations with a new state-of-the-art business complex near its headquarters in San Jose, California.
